    x11/cde: Fix armv7 build

    In attempting to fix powerpc64le, c66a851d13783558a8fa17ffcf64759a0c1b5bab
    broke armv7. Fix it.

    PR:             261359
    Reported by:    Robert Clausecker <fuz@fuz.su>
    Fixes:          c66a851d13783558a8fa17ffcf64759a0c1b5bab
